narrative:
New Franklin 2-A (precinct in Summit County) has 891 registered voters, with 52.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.0%, a modest Republican lean of 3.8 percentage points.
